headline: Turn header data into a provenance record
subtext: This desktop tool summarizes a forwarded message and exports a downloadable result for case files or team handoffs.
image_alt_text: A social graphic built around Hush Line on desktop showing a header-analysis tool with a readable authenticity summary and a button to download the result.

social.bluesky:
Forwarded evidence is easier to hand off when the result is already summarized.

Hush Line turns raw header data into a readable authenticity summary and downloadable result for case files or team handoffs.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.
social.linkedin:
Forwarded evidence is easier to hand off when the result is already summarized.

Hush Line turns raw header data into a readable authenticity summary and a downloadable result, so recipients can attach provenance findings to a case file or pass them to a teammate without retracing the same thread.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.
social.mastodon:
Forwarded evidence is easier to hand off when the result is already summarized.

Hush Line turns raw header data into a readable authenticity summary and downloadable result for case files or team handoffs.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.

rationale: The selected screen supports a different recipient workflow from the March 31 post. Instead of asking whether a message looks suspicious, this angle focuses on producing a handoff-ready provenance record after a message has already been forwarded for review.
copy_brief: Write for recipients and staff using Hush Line day to day, not for platform admins.
title: Tools - Email Validation status: appears valid (artvandelay)
